message:
feat(ufunc): add trapezoid_x, count_nonzero_axes; fix NaN-pivot LU decomposition

- Add trapezoid_x for non-uniform spacing via x sample points parameter,
  matching np.trapezoid(y, x=...). Uses per-interval dx from consecutive
  sample point differences. Includes 3 tests (non-uniform, uniform parity,
  length mismatch error).

- Add count_nonzero_axes for multi-axis count_nonzero, matching
  np.count_nonzero(a, axis=tuple). Converts to bool then reduces via sum
  over requested axes. Includes 1 test.

- Fix LU decomposition NaN-pivot handling in fnp-linalg to match
  LAPACK dgetrf behavior: skip elimination when pivot is NaN instead of
  dividing through, producing the same factorization NumPy/SciPy return
  for NaN-bearing matrices. This closes the NaN-coefficient parity gap
  in solve/inv.

- Update beads issue tracker: add trapezoid_x and count_nonzero_axes
  closed issues, mark NaN-coefficient solve/inv issue as in_progress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
